hero.title: We transform ideas into exceptional
hero.description: At Potion we create impactful websites and custom web applications that drive your business. Modern design, clean code, and measurable results.

showcase.title: Boost your digital presence
showcase.description: We combine creative design and technical development to create digital solutions that connect with your audience and deliver results.

feature1.title: User-centered design
feature1.description: We craft intuitive and attractive interfaces based on UX research. Every pixel has a purpose to maximize conversion and user satisfaction.

feature2.title: Robust and scalable development
feature2.description: We use cutting-edge technologies like Vue, Nuxt, and Tailwind CSS to build fast, secure applications ready to grow with you.

feature3.title: Measurable results
feature3.description: Every project includes analytics and performance metrics. We continuously optimize so your digital investment delivers maximum return.

features.title: Everything you need for your digital presence
features.description: We offer a comprehensive web design and development service to take your brand to the next level.

uiux.title: UI/UX Design
uiux.description: Modern interfaces and memorable user experiences that convert visitors into customers.

webdev.title: Web Development
webdev.description: Fast and responsive websites built with the latest technologies from the JavaScript ecosystem.

custom.title: Custom Applications
custom.description: Tailored web applications that automate processes and solve real business problems.

seo.title: SEO & Performance
seo.description: Search engine optimization and loading speed so people find you and stay.

support.title: Ongoing Support
support.description: Maintenance, updates, and technical support to keep your project in top condition.

consulting.title: Digital Consulting
consulting.description: We advise you on digital strategy, software architecture, and technology choices for your project.

process.title: Our process in 4 steps
process.description: A proven method to transform your vision into a functional and successful digital solution.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: We analyze your business, goals, and audience to define the perfect strategy. We understand what you need before writing a single line of code.

design.title: Design
design.description: We create wireframes and interactive prototypes to visualize your project. We iterate with you until we achieve the ideal design.

development.title: Development
development.description: We build your solution with clean code, modern technologies, and industry best practices. Rigorous testing included.

launch.title: Launch
launch.description: We deploy your project, set up analytics, and accompany you through the first steps. Your digital success starts here.

pricing.title: Plans tailored to your business
pricing.description: Choose the plan that best suits your needs. All include custom design, source code, and post-launch support.

starter.title: Starter
starter.description: Ideal for entrepreneurs and small businesses that need a professional web presence.
features: Landing page or site up to 5 pages

business.title: Business
business.description: For companies that need a complete and professional web solution.

enterprise.title: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Custom solutions for complex and large-scale projects.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.description: Companies that already trust Potion to drive their digital presence.

testimonial1.quote: Potion completely transformed our online presence. The new website tripled our inquiries and the design is exactly what we needed. Top-tier professionals.

testimonial2.quote: We needed a complex web application and the Potion team delivered it ahead of schedule. The code quality and attention to detail exceeded all our expectations.

testimonial3.quote: We've been working with Potion for two years and each project is better than the last. Their focus on performance and UX makes a real difference compared to other agencies.

cta.title: Ready to take your project to the next level?
cta.description: Tell us your idea and we'll help you make it real. First consultation is free, no strings attached.
